steps.title: Substitute $t=5$ into the equation
steps.content: The question asks for the speed $5$ seconds after the car began to accelerate, so substitute $t=5$ into $s = 50 + 4t$: $s = 50 + 4(5)$.

steps.title: Compute the speed
steps.content: $s = 50 + 20 = 70$ mi/h. That matches choice D — D is correct.
